Motion To Compel Further Responses And Responsive Documents To Request For Production, Set Two, And Request For Productiono Set Three, By Defendant Kenneth Miller; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOSHUA DEITZ, ESQ. of Rogers, Joseph, O'Donnell, Tel No. 415-956-2828 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Plaintiffs' counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS RIVER CANYON REAL ESTATE INVESTMENTS, LLC AND LAZARUS INVESTMENTS, LLC'S Motion To Compel Further Responses And Responsive Documents To Request For Production, Set Two, And Request For Productiono Set Three, By Defendant Kenneth Miller; Request For Sanctions is granted. No opposition was filed. Defendant Miller's objections, other than as to privilege, are overruled. Defendant shall provide substantive written and verified responses to Requests Nos. 23-36, and 53, within 15 days of the date of this order. Only privilege-related objections will be permitted to be asserted in the further written responses and if such objections are made then a privilege log must be provided identifying any withheld documents with enough specificity to permit them to be identified for purposes of a motion to compel production if such becomes necessary. Defendant Miller is further ordered to produce all non-privileged documents responsive to plaintiffs' Requests for Production of Documents Sets Two and Three, and to provide a privilege log identifying any documents withheld under claim of privilege, within 15 days of the date of this order. Sanctions to be paid by Defendant Miller to the moving party are awarded in the amount of $1,950.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
